{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Auditor",
  "description": "Fhemfel Group is a multifaceted company specializing in real estate, travel, and hospitality. We are dedicated to creating exceptional experiences and spaces that cater to the diverse needs of our clients. With a team of experts in each sector, we focus on delivering innovative solutions that combine luxury, comfort, and sustainability. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction drives us to excel in every project we undertake, making us a trusted partner in the industries we serve.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a diligent Internal Auditor to join our real estate firm.
	The successful candidate will evaluate and enhance the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance processes across the company.
	This role ensures compliance with company policies, financial regulations, and operational standards within the real estate sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct periodic internal audits of financial, operational, and administrative processes within the real estate business.
	Review financial records, transactions, and reports for accuracy and compliance.
	Assess internal control systems and identify areas of risk or weakness.
	Ensure adherence to company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare audit reports detailing findings, risks, and actionable recommendations.
	Follow up on audit findings to confirm corrective actions are implemented.
	Support management in fraud prevention and detection initiatives.
	Collaborate with departments to
	enhance processes and operational efficiency.
	Maintain comprehensive documentation of audit activities and evidence.
	Assist during external audits as required.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in internal audit or a related role.
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, CIA) is an advantage.
	Strong understanding of internal controls, auditing standards, and risk management.
	High level of integrity, confidentiality, and attention to detail.
	Excellent analytical and report-writing skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting/audit software.


Key Competencies:


	Analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
	Strong attention to detail
	Ethical judgment and integrity
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested an qualified candidates should send their application to: fhemfelhr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Internal Auditor Job at Fhemfel Home




        
    

        
        Fhemfel Group is a multifaceted company specializing in real estate, travel, and hospitality. We are dedicated to creating exceptional experiences and spaces that cater to the diverse needs of our clients. With a team of experts in each sector, we focus on delivering innovative solutions that combine luxury, comfort, and sustainability. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction drives us to excel in every project we undertake, making us a trusted partner in the industries we serve.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor
Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a diligent Internal Auditor to join our real estate firm.
	The successful candidate will evaluate and enhance the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance processes across the company.
	This role ensures compliance with company policies, financial regulations, and operational standards within the real estate sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct periodic internal audits of financial, operational, and administrative processes within the real estate business.
	Review financial records, transactions, and reports for accuracy and compliance.
	Assess internal control systems and identify areas of risk or weakness.
	Ensure adherence to company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare audit reports detailing findings, risks, and actionable recommendations.
	Follow up on audit findings to confirm corrective actions are implemented.
	Support management in fraud prevention and detection initiatives.
	Collaborate with departments to
	enhance processes and operational efficiency.
	Maintain comprehensive documentation of audit activities and evidence.
	Assist during external audits as required.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in internal audit or a related role.
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, CIA) is an advantage.
	Strong understanding of internal controls, auditing standards, and risk management.
	High level of integrity, confidentiality, and attention to detail.
	Excellent analytical and report-writing skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting/audit software.


Key Competencies:


	Analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
	Strong attention to detail
	Ethical judgment and integrity
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills


Method of Application 
Interested an qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Fhemfel Group is a multifaceted company specializing in real estate, travel, and hospitality. We are dedicated to creating exceptional experiences and spaces that cater to the diverse needs of our clients. With a team of experts in each sector, we focus on delivering innovative solutions that combine luxury, comfort, and sustainability. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction drives us to excel in every project we undertake, making us a trusted partner in the industries we serve.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Gwarinpa, Abuja&nbsp; (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking a highly creative, result-driven, and experienced Digital Marketer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing digital marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility, generate quality leads, increase audience engagement, and support overall business growth.
	The successful candidate must possess strong analytical skills, content creation abilities, and hands-on experience managing campaigns across multiple digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement effective digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, engagement, and conversions.
	Plan, manage, and optimize digital campaigns across social media, email marketing, Google Ads, SEO, SEM, and other online channels.
	Create engaging and compelling content for websites, blogs, newsletters, and social media platforms.
	Monitor campaign performance and generate reports using analytics tools to measure ROI and improve results.
	Conduct market research and identify trends, audience preferences, and competitor activities.
	Manage the company&rsquo;s social media accounts and maintain consistent brand messaging across all platforms.
	Optimize website content and landing pages to improve search engine rankings and user experience.
	Collaborate with the design, sales, and content teams to execute marketing initiatives effectively.
	Build and manage email marketing campaigns to nurture leads and maintain customer engagement.
	Stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in digital marketing.
	Support lead generation and customer acquisition efforts through data-driven marketing strategies.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years of proven experience in digital marketing or related roles.
	Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience using Google Analytics and other digital marketing tools.
	Strong understanding of SEO, SEM, PPC, social media marketing, email marketing, and content marketing strategies.
	Experience in audience targeting, campaign optimization, and lead generation strategies.
	Proficiency in Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Canva, and other digital marketing platforms/tools.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
	Creative mindset with the ability to develop innovative marketing ideas and campaigns.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested an qualified candidates should send their application to: fhemfelhr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Digital Marketer Job at Fhemfel Home




        
    

        
        Fhemfel Group is a multifaceted company specializing in real estate, travel, and hospitality. We are dedicated to creating exceptional experiences and spaces that cater to the diverse needs of our clients. With a team of experts in each sector, we focus on delivering innovative solutions that combine luxury, comfort, and sustainability. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction drives us to excel in every project we undertake, making us a trusted partner in the industries we serve.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Gwarinpa, Abuja  (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly creative, result-driven, and experienced Digital Marketer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing digital marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility, generate quality leads, increase audience engagement, and support overall business growth.
	The successful candidate must possess strong analytical skills, content creation abilities, and hands-on experience managing campaigns across multiple digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement effective digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, engagement, and conversions.
	Plan, manage, and optimize digital campaigns across social media, email marketing, Google Ads, SEO, SEM, and other online channels.
	Create engaging and compelling content for websites, blogs, newsletters, and social media platforms.
	Monitor campaign performance and generate reports using analytics tools to measure ROI and improve results.
	Conduct market research and identify trends, audience preferences, and competitor activities.
	Manage the company’s social media accounts and maintain consistent brand messaging across all platforms.
	Optimize website content and landing pages to improve search engine rankings and user experience.
	Collaborate with the design, sales, and content teams to execute marketing initiatives effectively.
	Build and manage email marketing campaigns to nurture leads and maintain customer engagement.
	Stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in digital marketing.
	Support lead generation and customer acquisition efforts through data-driven marketing strategies.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years of proven experience in digital marketing or related roles.
	Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience using Google Analytics and other digital marketing tools.
	Strong understanding of SEO, SEM, PPC, social media marketing, email marketing, and content marketing strategies.
	Experience in audience targeting, campaign optimization, and lead generation strategies.
	Proficiency in Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Canva, and other digital marketing platforms/tools.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
	Creative mindset with the ability to develop innovative marketing ideas and campaigns.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested an qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Job Position: Site Engineer / Supervisor

	Do you have hands-on construction site experience and a passion for engineering excellence?
	We are looking for a smart, motivated, and detail-oriented Site Engineer to join our growing team in Lagos!

Your Responsibilities Will Include:

	Ability to read drawings and supervise site work.
	Strong teamwork and communication abilities.
	Basic reporting and project documentation skills.


&nbsp;Salary
N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: feijoalimited@gmail.com using &quot;Application for Entry-Level Site Engineer&quot;as the subject of the email.

Site Engineer / Supervisor Job at Feijoa Investment Limited




        
    

        
        Feijoa Investment Limited is a Real Estate Investment Company located in Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer / Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Do you have hands-on construction site experience and a passion for engineering excellence?
	We are looking for a smart, motivated, and detail-oriented Site Engineer to join our growing team in Lagos!


Responsibilities
Your Responsibilities Will Include:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Monitoring daily construction activities on site.
	Assisting in planning and coordinating with contractors.
	Ensuring compliance with safety and quality standards.
	Preparing daily / weekly reports and keeping site records.
	Supporting project managers.


What You’ll Need


	Qualification: B.Sc. or HND qualification in Civil Engineering.
	Experience: Minimum 2 years Post NYSC working on construction sites.
	Residence: Must reside in or around Ojota, Ikeja, Ketu, Palmgrove, Maryland, Gbagada, Oworonshoki, Yaba, Bariga, Oshodi, Ilupeju, or Mushin.


Key Skills:


	Solid understanding of civil engineering and site operations.
	Ability to read drawings and supervise site work.
	Strong teamwork and communication abilities.
	Basic reporting and project documentation skills.


 Salary
N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: [email protected] using "Application for Entry-Level Site Engineer"as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bank Sales Executive

Job Locations: Lagos Mainland, Lagos Island and Apapa - Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute sales strategies to achieve revenue targets.
	Build and maintain strong business relationships with individual and corporate clients
	Educate clients on product features, benefits, and usage.
	Passionate and hardworking Sales personnel.


Requirements


	Qualification (HND, B.Sc)
	Experience in Sales is an advantage.
	Age - 35 years and below.


Salary and Benefits


	N113,000 monthly (Gross) + Commission
	13th Month, Pension, Leave, HMO
",

Bank Sales Executive Job at Tribest Corporate Support Limited




        
    

        
        Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bank Sales Executive

Job Locations: Lagos Mainland, Lagos Island and Apapa - Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and execute sales strategies to achieve revenue targets.
	Build and maintain strong business relationships with individual and corporate clients
	Educate clients on product features, benefits, and usage.
	Passionate and hardworking Sales personnel.


Requirements


	Qualification (HND, B.Sc)
	Experience in Sales is an advantage.
	Age - 35 years and below.


Salary and Benefits


	N113,000 monthly (Gross) + Commission
	13th Month, Pension, Leave, HMO
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Brand Representative",
  "description": "Alan &amp; Grant - Our work is focused on creating innovative HR and Organizational Development Solutions aimed at Performance Improvement &amp; Business Growth. We currently serve clients across various sectors of the Economy from locations in Jos, Port Harcourt and Lagos.

Ware recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand Representative

Job Location: Abuja

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The Brand Representative is responsible for building brand awareness, driving consumer engagement, and ensuring excellent brand visibility and in-store execution across Grocery, Convenience, On-Premise, HoReCa, E-commerce, and B2B channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Execute the company marketing campaigns, promotions, and consumer activation programs.
	Drive product trial and sampling activities to increase consumer awareness and purchase intent.
	Provide timely feedback on consumer trends and customer preferences.
	Maintain high-quality merchandising and visibility in all assigned outlets.
	Build strong relationships with store owners, managers, and outlet staff.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field.
	Minimum of 1&ndash;3 years of experience in brand activation, merchandising, sales support, within the FMCG space
	Experience working with consumer brands, beverages, or retail environments is preferred.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
	Can work independently and as part of a team.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-08",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Alan & Grant"
    
  },

Brand Representative Job at Alan & Grant




        
    

        
        Alan & Grant - Our work is focused on creating innovative HR and Organizational Development Solutions aimed at Performance Improvement & Business Growth. We currently serve clients across various sectors of the Economy from locations in Jos, Port Harcourt and Lagos.

Ware recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand Representative

Job Location: Abuja

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Brand Representative is responsible for building brand awareness, driving consumer engagement, and ensuring excellent brand visibility and in-store execution across Grocery, Convenience, On-Premise, HoReCa, E-commerce, and B2B channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Execute the company marketing campaigns, promotions, and consumer activation programs.
	Drive product trial and sampling activities to increase consumer awareness and purchase intent.
	Provide timely feedback on consumer trends and customer preferences.
	Maintain high-quality merchandising and visibility in all assigned outlets.
	Build strong relationships with store owners, managers, and outlet staff.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field.
	Minimum of 1–3 years of experience in brand activation, merchandising, sales support, within the FMCG space
	Experience working with consumer brands, beverages, or retail environments is preferred.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
	Can work independently and as part of a team.
